channel.title: Prebuilt Configs on MCP Toolbox for Databases
channel.description: Recent content in Prebuilt Configs on MCP Toolbox for Databases

item.title: Dataplex
item.description:
Dataplex

  • --prebuilt value: dataplex
  • Environment Variables:
    • DATAPLEX_PROJECT: The GCP project ID.
  • Permissions:
    • Dataplex Reader (roles/dataplex.viewer) to search and look up entries.
    • Dataplex Editor (roles/dataplex.editor) to modify entries.
  • Tools:
    • search_entries: Searches for entries in Dataplex Catalog.
    • lookup_entry: Retrieves a specific entry from Dataplex Catalog.
    • search_aspect_types: Finds aspect types relevant to the query.
